description_long: This is a section of a black metal fence, featuring six vertical pickets evenly spaced and connected by two horizontal rails at the top and bottom. Each picket is topped with a sharply pointed spearhead finial, giving the fence a secure and ornamental appearance. The rails are rectangular in cross-section and run parallel to each other, providing structural support. The overall design is utilitarian yet decorative, commonly seen in urban environments for property demarcation and security. The finish appears smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting a protective coating over the metal. The fence is robust and not intended to be moved or traversed easily.
description: A black metal fence section with six vertical pickets, each topped with pointed spearhead finials, and two horizontal rails. The design is both secure and decorative, typical for urban property boundaries.
description_view_0: A direct end-on view showing the pointed spearhead finials aligned in a row, with the vertical pickets appearing as thin lines.
description_view_1: A frontal view displaying the full fence section, including all six vertical pickets, two horizontal rails, and the pointed spearhead tops.
description_view_2: Another end-on view, identical to view 0, emphasizing the sharpness and alignment of the spearhead finials.
description_view_3: A second frontal view, similar to view 1, showing the entire fence section with its vertical pickets and horizontal rails.
